<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.8 -->

# agents-reverse-engineer

npx-installable CLI toolkit for AI coding assistants that generates AI-optimized `.sum` file summaries, `AGENTS.md` hierarchical documentation, and runtime integration hooks for Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and Codex, with A/B testing framework for measuring AI planning and implementation quality impact.

## Stack

**Runtime**: Node.js 18+ with TypeScript (ES2022 modules via tsconfig.json)  
**AI Backends**: Claude CLI, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini, OpenCode (subprocess adapters)  
**File Discovery**: fast-glob with ignore/isbinaryfile filters  
**Git Operations**: simple-git (change detection, worktree isolation)  
**Schema Validation**: zod (config.yaml schema)  
**Output Formats**: YAML frontmatter (`.sum` files), NDJSON (telemetry traces), HTML (dashboard reports via Chart.js CDN)  
**Entry Points**: `bin.agents-reverse-engineer` and `bin.are` → `dist/cli/index.js`  
**Core API**: `exports["./core"]` → `dist/core/index.js` (`@beta` stability)

## Contents

**Configuration & Licensing**

- [package.json](./package.json) — npm package metadata v1.2.8. Entry points: `bin.agents-reverse-engineer`/`bin.are` → `dist/cli/index.js`, `exports["."]` → `dist/cli/index.js`, `exports["./core"]` → `dist/core/index.js` with type definitions. Build scripts: `build` (tsc), `build:hooks` (scripts/build-hooks.js), `prepublishOnly` (sequential builds), `prepack` (removes LICENSE.sum/README.md.sum), `dev` (tsx watch). Dependencies: fast-glob, ignore, isbinaryfile, jsonc-parser, simple-git, yaml, zod, picocolors. Node >=18.0.0 required.
- [tsconfig.json](./tsconfig.json) — TypeScript compiler config: target ES2022, module/moduleResolution NodeNext, outDir dist/, rootDir src/, declaration/declarationMap/sourceMap true, strict true, forceConsistentCasingInFileNames true, isolatedModules true, resolveJsonModule true. Include src/**/*, exclude node_modules/dist.

**Documentation**  
- [README.md](./README.md) — Project documentation and entry point. Installation: `npx agents-reverse-engineer@latest` (interactive installer), `--runtime <rt> -g|-l` (non-interactive). Commands: `are init` (config), `are discover` (scan+plan), `are generate` (full generation), `are update` (git-aware incremental), `are specify` (aggregate AGENTS.md → specs/SPEC.md), `are rebuild` (reconstruct from spec), `are plan "<task>"` (A/B planning test), `are implement "<task>"` (A/B implementation test), `are clean` (remove artifacts), `are dashboard` (telemetry). Global flags: `--model`, `--backend`, `--concurrency`, `--dry-run`, `--force`, `--fail-fast`, `--show-excluded`, `--debug`, `--trace`. Config schema: exclude.patterns/vendorDirs/binaryExtensions, options.followSymlinks/maxFileSize, output.colors, ai.backend/model/timeoutMs/maxRetries/concurrency/telemetry.keepRuns. Artifacts: `.sum` (YAML frontmatter + Purpose/Public Interface/Dependencies/Implementation Notes), `AGENTS.md` (directory overviews), `CLAUDE.md`/`GEMINI.md`/`OPENCODE.md` (pointer files), `GENERATION-PLAN.md` (post-order traversal). Workflow: install → init → discover → generate → update. Codex integration: local install writes `./AGENTS.override.md`, global install writes `~/.codex/AGENTS.override.md`. Telemetry dashboard: `.agents-reverse-engineer/telemetry/` logs, `are dashboard` for costs/tokens/latency. Total session costs: ccusage (`npx ccusage@latest`, `npx @ccusage/codex@latest`, `npx @ccusage/opencode@latest`). Requirements: Node.js 18+, AI coding assistant (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, any AGENTS.md-compatible).

## Subdirectories

**[hooks/](./hooks/)** — Runtime integration hooks for Claude Desktop and OpenCode. SessionStart hooks spawn detached npm version checkers to `~/.claude/cache/are-update-check.json` and `~/.config/opencode/cache/are-update-check.json`. PostToolUse hook walks directory tree from `tool_input.file_path` to `data.cwd`, loads AGENTS.md files, injects as `additionalContext` with session-scoped deduplication via `${os.tmpdir()}/are-context-loader/${session_id}.json`.

**[scripts/](./scripts/)** — VHS demo recorders (demo-install.tape → assets/demo-install.gif), build tooling (build-hooks.js copies hooks/*.js → hooks/dist/), circle frame generator (generate-circle-frames.js → 36 ASCII art frames with Gaussian falloff), analysis scripts (analyze-sum-ratios.sh: .sum/<25% target, analyze-agents-compression.sh: AGENTS.md/<50% excellent). Demo workflow: `npm run build` → `ln -sf fake-npx.sh /tmp/are-demo-bin/npx` → `vhs scripts/demo-install.tape`. Build hooks: `npm run prepublishOnly` → `build-hooks.js` → `hooks/dist/` populated.

**[src/](./src/)** — Core source directory. Exports programmatic API via `core/index.ts` (AIService, discovery, generation, orchestration, quality, change detection, config, imports). Implements CLI commands via `cli/` (init, discover, generate, update, clean, specify, rebuild, plan, implement, dashboard). Orchestrates AI-powered documentation via `generation/` (prompt templates, .sum writers, AGENTS.md aggregators) and `orchestration/` (concurrency pooling, two-phase pipeline, quality validation). Provides quality validation via `quality/` (code-vs-doc export comparison, code-vs-code duplicate detection, phantom-paths AGENTS.md reference validation). Supplies installer/integration tooling for AI assistants via `installer/` (interactive TTY wizard, command template installation, .gitignore/.vscode/settings.json merging) and `integration/` (environment detection, runtime-specific command generation). Three-tier architecture: CLI layer (argument parsing, config loading, backend resolution) → Orchestration layer (concurrency pooling, two-phase pipeline, progress reporting) → Generation layer (prompt construction, .sum serialization, AGENTS.md aggregation). Discovery pipeline: `discovery/walker.ts` (fast-glob) → `discovery/filters/` (gitignore/vendor/binary/custom) → `generation/executor.ts` (execution plan) → `orchestration/runner.ts`. Quality pipeline: `quality/inconsistency/code-vs-doc.ts` → `quality/inconsistency/code-vs-code.ts` → `quality/phantom-paths/validator.ts` → `quality/inconsistency/reporter.ts`. Telemetry pipeline: `ai/telemetry/logger.ts` → `ai/telemetry/run-log.ts` → `orchestration/trace.ts` → `dashboard/` (cost/token/trend visualization).

## Architecture

**Two-Phase Pipeline**:  
1. **File Analysis Phase**: Concurrency pool processes files via `buildFilePrompt()` → AI subprocess → `.sum` serialization with YAML frontmatter (file_type, generated_at) + markdown sections (Purpose, Public Interface, Dependencies, Implementation Notes)
2. **Directory Aggregation Phase**: Post-order traversal processes directories via `buildDirectoryPrompt()` (integrates file summaries, Import Map, Project Directory Structure, user notes) → AI subprocess → `AGENTS.md` generation with adaptive sections (Contents, Subdirectories, Architecture/Data Flow, Stack, Structure, Patterns, Configuration, API Surface, File Relationships, Behavioral Contracts, Reproduction-Critical Constants, Workflow & Conventions)

**AI Subprocess Lifecycle**:  
`AIService` spawns backend CLIs (claude, codex, gemini, opencode) via `SubprocessProvider` with CWD override to `os.tmpdir()` (prevents context file discovery), enforces `timeoutMs` with SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation (5s grace period), retries only `RATE_LIMIT` errors (exponential backoff with jitter, never timeouts), logs per-call telemetry to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/`.

**Git-Aware Incremental Updates**:  
`are update` uses `simple-git` to detect modified/added/deleted files since last run, computes SHA-256 content hashes, regenerates stale `.sum` files, removes orphaned artifacts, updates affected `AGENTS.md` files. Flag: `--uncommitted` includes unstaged changes.

**A/B Testing Worktrees**:  
`are plan` and `are implement` create isolated git worktrees with branches `are/{plan|implement}/{with-docs|without-docs}/{taskSlug}`, execute AI-driven tasks in parallel, extract quantitative metrics (detail level, file references, actionable steps, files created, lines changed, commits), optionally run blind AI quality evaluation (via third judge), persist results to `.agents-reverse-engineer/comparisons/`. Cleanup: SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers call `worktrees.cleanup()` to remove worktrees (branches preserved).

**Quality Validation**:  
- `quality/inconsistency/code-vs-doc.ts`: compares TypeScript/JavaScript exports against .sum Public Interface sections, detects missing/phantom symbols
- `quality/inconsistency/code-vs-code.ts`: identifies duplicate symbols across files
- `quality/phantom-paths/validator.ts`: validates AGENTS.md path references (file links, subdirectory links, markdown links) against actual directory structure
- Failures exit with code 1 (partial failure) or 2 (total failure)

**Concurrency Model**:  
`runPool()` implements shared-iterator pattern (workers pull from `tasks.entries()` iterator), starts new task immediately when prior completes, avoids batch-idle anti-pattern. Auto-detects concurrency from CPU cores and available memory, configurable via `ai.concurrency` (1-20) or `--concurrency` flag.

**Variant Routing**:  
`variant` parameter writes `.${variant}.sum` and `AGENTS.${variant}.md`, hub files import `@AGENTS.${activeVariant}.md`, variant files bypass user-preservation logic.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Exit Codes**:  
- 0: all operations succeeded  
- 1: partial failure (some files/tasks failed)  
- 2: total failure (CLI not found, no files processed, conflict detection)

**Subprocess Spawning**:
```javascript
spawn(process.execPath, ['-e', inlineScript], {stdio: 'ignore', detached: true, windowsHide: true})
```

**Version Check Command**:
```javascript
execSync('npm view agents-reverse-engineer version', {timeout: 10000})
```

**AGENTS.md Marker Detection**:
```javascript
content.includes("Generated by agents-reverse-engineer")
```

**Timeout Enforcement**: `runSubprocess()` enforces `timeoutMs` with SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation after 5s grace period, attempts process group kill (`-pid`) before falling back to single process kill.

**Retry Strategy**: AIService retries only `RATE_LIMIT` errors (never `TIMEOUT`), uses exponential backoff with jitter, emits `{type:'retry', attempt, taskLabel, errorCode}` trace events.

**Progress Monitoring**: Commands write logs to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.log`, telemetry to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json`.

**Trace Output**: Commands with `--trace` flag write NDJSON events to `.agents-reverse-engineer/traces/trace-{timestamp}.ndjson`, subprocess logs to `.agents-reverse-engineer/subprocess-logs/{timestamp}/`.

**Compression Thresholds**:  
- `.sum` target: 25% of source size (pass), 30% acceptable, status symbols: `✓`, `~`, `✗`
- AGENTS.md aggregation: EXCELLENT <50%, GOOD <70%, ACCEPTABLE <90%, MINIMAL ≥90%

**VHS Demo Configuration**:  
- Install demo dimensions: `Set Width 1200`, `Set Height 400`, `Set Framerate 30`
- YT Shorts vertical: `Set Width 1080`, `Set Height 1920`, `Set FontSize 22`, `Set Framerate 30`
- Theme: Catppuccin Mocha, 16pt font, 20px padding
- Timing: `Sleep 4s` (banner), `Sleep 7s` (installation complete), `Sleep 500ms` (user input)

**Circle Frame Generation**:  
36 frames (10° rotation), dimensions 16×6, density chars `' .·:;oO@'` (8 levels), ring geometry `ringInner=0.70`/`ringOuter=1.05`, Gaussian falloff `exp(-(dAngle²)/(2*0.8²))`, base brightness 0.15, peak 1.0.

**File Patterns**:  
- Exclude from analysis: `*/node_modules/*`, `*/.git/*`, dot-directories (`grep -v "^\./\."`)
- Hook source: `hooks/*.js` (excluding dist)
- Frame output: `src/installer/frames/frame_{1..36}.txt` + `index.ts`

## API Surface

**Programmatic API** (via `core/index.ts`):  
- **Logger**: `nullLogger`, `consoleLogger`, `Logger`  
- **AI**: `AIService`, `AIProvider`, `AIBackend`, `SubprocessProvider`, `withRetry`, `DEFAULT_RETRY_OPTIONS`  
- **Discovery**: `discoverFiles`, `walkDirectory`, `applyFilters`, `FileFilter`, `FilterResult`  
- **Generation Prompts**: `buildFilePrompt`, `buildDirectoryPrompt`, `detectLanguage`  
- **Generation Writers**: `writeSumFile`, `readSumFile`, `writeAgentsMd`, `writeAgentsMdHub`, `writeClaudeMdPointer`  
- **Orchestration**: `DocumentationOrchestrator`, `buildExecutionPlan`, `formatExecutionPlanAsMarkdown`, `runPool`  
- **Quality**: `extractExports`, `checkCodeVsDoc`, `checkCodeVsCode`, `checkPhantomPaths`, `buildInconsistencyReport`  
- **Change Detection**: `computeContentHash`, `isGitRepo`, `getChangedFiles`  
- **Config**: `loadConfig`, `findProjectRoot`, `Config`  
- **Imports**: `extractImports`, `extractDirectoryImports`, `formatImportMap`

**CLI Commands** (via `cli/index.ts`):  
- `are init` — create config, update .gitignore/.vscode/settings.json  
- `are discover` — walk directory, generate GENERATION-PLAN.md  
- `are generate` — full two-phase documentation generation  
- `are update` — incremental regeneration for changed files  
- `are clean` — delete .sum/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md artifacts  
- `are specify` — synthesize spec from AGENTS.md docs  
- `are rebuild` — reconstruct project from spec  
- `are plan` — A/B test planning with/without docs  
- `are implement` — A/B test implementation with/without docs  
- `are dashboard` — telemetry visualization (table/JSON/HTML/trends/timeline)

## File Relationships

- `package.json` defines entry points → `dist/cli/index.js` (CLI router) and `dist/core/index.js` (programmatic API)
- `tsconfig.json` configures TypeScript compilation: `src/` → `dist/` with ES2022 modules
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` documents developer workflow: `npm run build` (tsc), `npm run dev` (tsx watch)
- `README.md` documents user-facing CLI commands, config schema, artifact formats
- `LANGUAGES-MANIFEST.md` cross-references package manifest files used by `generation/prompts/builder.ts` for import map construction
- `LICENSE` (MIT) applies to all source files
- `hooks/` provides runtime integration hooks installed by `installer/` into `~/.claude/`, `~/.config/opencode/`
- `scripts/` provides build tooling (`build-hooks.js` copies hooks/*.js → hooks/dist/) and analysis tools
- `src/cli/index.ts` routes commands to `src/cli/{command}.ts` modules
- `src/core/index.ts` barrel-exports all programmatic APIs from subdirectories
- `src/orchestration/runner.ts` imports `buildFilePrompt`/`buildDirectoryPrompt` from `src/generation/prompts/`, writers from `src/generation/writers/`, quality checks from `src/quality/`
- `src/generation/prompts/builder.ts` imports `extractImports`/`formatImportMap` from `src/imports/`
- `src/ai/service.ts` wraps backend CLIs via `src/ai/providers/subprocess.ts`, uses `src/ai/retry.ts` for exponential backoff
- `src/dashboard/index.ts` imports cost calculators, log readers, view renderers

## Workflow & Conventions

**Installation Order**:  
1. `npx agents-reverse-engineer@latest` (install commands)  
2. `/are-init` in AI assistant (create config)  
3. `/are-discover` (scan codebase)  
4. `/are-generate` (execute plan)

**Update Strategy**: Git-aware incremental via `/are-update` — only regenerates changed files. Use `--uncommitted` to include unstaged changes.

**Codex Integration**: Local install writes `./AGENTS.override.md`; global install writes `~/.codex/AGENTS.override.md` with lazy AGENTS hierarchy loading guidance.

**Telemetry**: All runs log to `.agents-reverse-engineer/telemetry/` (costs, tokens, latency). View via `are dashboard`. For total session costs beyond ARE, use ccusage: `npx ccusage@latest` (Claude Code), `npx @ccusage/codex@latest` (Codex), `npx @ccusage/opencode@latest` (OpenCode).

**Concurrency Tuning**: `ai.concurrency` auto-detects from CPU cores and available memory. Lower values (1-5) for resource-constrained environments; higher values (10-20) for faster generation with more memory.

**Timeout Tuning**: `ai.timeoutMs` defaults to 5 minutes. Increase for very large files or slow connections. `specify.ts` and `rebuild.ts` upgrade to 900s minimum.

**Model Upgrades**: `specify.ts` and `rebuild.ts` upgrade default `sonnet` to `opus` for quality. Command-line `--model` flag overrides upgrade logic.

**User Content Preservation**: User-authored AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md detected by absence of `GENERATED_MARKER_PREFIX`, renamed to .local.md on first generation, preserved via `@{filename}.local.md` import directive.

**Dry-Run Mode**: All commands support `--dry-run` for cost estimation and workflow validation without AI calls or file writes.

**Checkpoint Resume**: `rebuild/checkpoint.ts` tracks per-module status (`pending`/`done`/`failed`) with spec hash validation, supports resume from partial runs.

**Subprocess CWD Override**: When spawning AI CLI subprocesses, set CWD to `os.tmpdir()` via `AIService.setSubprocessCwd()` to prevent AI CLIs (especially Claude) from discovering project context files (CLAUDE.md, package.json, CLAUDE_CONTEXT.md) that waste cache tokens on automatic ingestion.

**Worktree Management**: `plan.ts` and `implement.ts` create temporary git worktrees with branch naming `are/{plan|implement}/{with-docs|without-docs}/{taskSlug}`. Cleanup: SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers call `worktrees.cleanup()` to remove worktrees (branches preserved).

**Demo Recording Pipeline**:  
1. `npm run build`  
2. `mkdir -p /tmp/are-demo-bin && ln -sf $(pwd)/scripts/fake-npx.sh /tmp/are-demo-bin/npx`  
3. `export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"`  
4. `vhs scripts/demo-install.tape` → `assets/demo-install.gif`

**Build Hooks**: `npm run prepublishOnly` → `scripts/build-hooks.js` → `hooks/dist/` populated for package distribution.

**Quality Checks**:  
- Run `scripts/analyze-sum-ratios.sh` to validate `.sum` compression (target: <25%)  
- Run `scripts/analyze-agents-compression.sh` to measure AGENTS.md aggregation efficiency
